title: Better End Portal
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25f03191b4920394b2859666e93c8b6ed0dd765c.png)

# New End Portal
![Portal Lighting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f69e1ee4436b7844e536e877e5d54fae2f95b02.gif)

Removes the need for strongholds to reach the end, and introduces a nether-like portal to reach the end.

# Void Matter
![Void Matter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d37c61e812c9c5840faaa3a53f00c6cb449a16.png)

Adds a new block called Void Matter that generates within the bedrock layers, and is mineable only with a netherrite pickaxe.
